title: subworkflow - aws run patch baseline
description:
Subworkflow to run patch baseline on EC2 instances using AWS Systems Manager

Parameters:

instanceId: (Required) EC2 instance ID
awsregion: (Required) AWS region
baselineId: (Optional) Patch baseline ID
operation: (Optional) Operation type - Install, Scan, or Uninstall
dynatraceawsconnection: (Required) AWS OIDC connection

Waits for patching to complete
guide:
## 🔧 **Run Patch Baseline**

Applies patches using Patch Manager via SSM.
